utility_evaluation.REASONING:

- destination: Prague, Czech Republic (clear)
- travel_dates: 2024-10-15 to 2024-10-19 (specific dates provided)
- transportation: includes flight type, route, airline, and cost (complete)
- accommodation: includes name, duration, and cost (complete)
- activities: includes detailed list and cost (complete)
- additional_services: includes camera equipment rental and cost (complete)
- total_budget: includes total cost, currency, budget limit, and within_budget status (complete)
Therefore, all 7 out of 7 items are successfully covered and fully specified.
